response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with genuine developer-tooling credentials — test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD infrastructure, and recent AI-agent developer tooling — plus deep breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems. However, this is a people-management role requiring at least 2 years of people management and 3 years of formal technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing engineers, conducting performance reviews, or owning team roadmaps. Mobile-platform experience exists but is dated, and there is no demonstrated experience leading organizational change. He fits a Staff/Senior IC profile, not a Level II Engineering Manager profile.
strengths: Substantial developer-tools background: test runners (Trial), assertion libraries (Fluent-Asserts), CI/GitLab infrastructure, and MCP code generators
18+ years of software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Strong quality-engineering culture: TDD, trunk-based development, workshops, coding dojos, and community teaching
concerns: No formal people-management experience — no evidence of direct reports, one-on-ones, or performance management
No demonstrated organizational-change leadership or team roadmap ownership at scale
Mobile-platform experience (iOS/Apple TV) is from 2015-2016 and not tied to platform tooling or build systems at ecosystem scale

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure expertise
Exceeds years-of-development requirement with broad technical depth
